title: myriocephalus biflorus
intro: Myriocephalus biflorus, also known as the 'bitter leaf plant' or 'bitter daisy', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Myriocephalus biflorus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
